items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'identity handoff audit trail' requirement, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case specifies the need for an audit trail, yet the prior steps do not indicate any checks or validations related to this aspect, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence of the audit trail's existence or functionality, the validation cannot proceed.
